items.label: Business Applications
items.headline: Business Applications reached 61.3K in June 2026, a loss of 3.3K versus May 2026.

items.label: Miami MSA unemployment
items.headline: Miami MSA unemployment eased to 3.6% in May 2026, down 0.3 points versus April 2026.

items.label: Tampa MSA unemployment
items.headline: Tampa MSA unemployment eased to 4.5% in May 2026, down 0.2 points versus April 2026.
